message:
fix: remove dead mail functions from statusline, deduplicate crew session parsing

statusline.go: Remove getUnreadMailCount() and getMailPreview() which
were defined but never called. getMailPreviewWithRoot() (which IS used)
remains.

handoff.go: Refactor sessionWorkDir crew case to use the existing
parseCrewSessionName() from crew_helpers.go instead of reimplementing
the same gt-rig-crew-name parsing with a different algorithm.

Fixes: gt-nxjhh, gt-rrhfh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
